body.activation: runs during export workflow extension verification; if export payload is not a zip and manifest.export_type is incident_evidence, fail; if not zip and not incident_evidence, no-op
body.manifest_source: if export manifest object contains manifest_version use it as bundle manifest; else read first JSON object among manifest.json then bundle_manifest.json from zip; absent bundle manifest is no-op
body.files_list: bundle_manifest.files must be a list of objects; each entry.name is non-empty string; entry.schema is string or null; duplicate names overwrite earlier schemas in current verifier map
body.required_file_rule: each required file must have exact schema in files map and the name must exist in the zip; permits.jsonl is also checked explicitly
body.incident_metadata: incident_metadata.json must parse as JSON object with schema exactly keel.incident_evidence/v1
body.jsonl_read_rules: workflow_declarations.jsonl, workflow_amendments.jsonl, permits.jsonl, and mcp_tool_decisions.jsonl are decoded as UTF-8; blank lines skipped; every nonblank line must parse as JSON object
body.ignored_content: admin_actions.jsonl, bracket_checkpoints.json, and governance_events.jsonl are required by manifest/name/schema but not parsed by current verifier recipe
body.workflow_rules: workflow declarations and amendments are verified using keel.workflow.canonicalization.v1 with declaration effective hash not required; permits.jsonl workflow snapshots are cross-checked when present
